title: The Age of The Sovereignpreneur Has Begun
summary: Jordan Urbs presents the "sovereignpreneur" thesis at Bitcoin 2026, arguing that Bitcoin enables money sovereignty while AI provides labor leverage. He contends that individual builders can achieve autonomy by stacking sovereign money, machine intelligence, and freedom through tools like Umbrel, Lightning, and agentic AI systems.
